steps.title: Use the perimeter total
steps.content: The perimeter is the sum of the three side lengths. If the third side is $x$ centimeters, the equation is $$5+7+x=21$$

steps.title: Subtract the known sides
steps.content: First combine the given side lengths, then subtract that sum from the perimeter: $$12+x=21$$ $$x=21-12$$ $$x=9$$ The answer is B.
